raw.summary: The code has multiple security and functional issues: no input sanitization for username (only length and character set not enforced), email validation is trivial, file extension is derived from MIME type guess (not validated), filename may contain path separators or null bytes (not sanitized), and the file save uses the original filename suffix which could be manipulated. Additionally, the code does not enforce the 2MB size limit or the allowed image types (PNG/JPEG) as required by the scenario.
